---
title: "measlesvaccinedata"
format: html
---

# Install Packages

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(janitor)
library(gtsummary)
```

# Dataset

## Loading Dataset

```{r}
# load dataset
measles <- readr::read_csv('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rfordatascience/tidytuesday/main/data/2020/2020-02-25/measles.csv')

# make sure dataset loaded correctly
head(measles)
```

## Cleaning/Wrangling Dataset

```{r}
measles1 <- measles |> filter(!is.na(measles$state))
measles2 <- measles1 |> filter(!is.na(measles1$type))
measles3 <- measles2 |> filter(!is.na(measles2$enroll))
```
